ddls:
CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "mandatory" TEXT /* Indicates if the attribute is mandatory or optional */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type of the attribute */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value used if no value is provided */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Size of the attribute for Text and Decimal types */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the attribute */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the attribute */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., Basic, Complex, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extension */,
  "extension_name" TEXT /* Name of the extension */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the extension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the extension */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the extension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute being used */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module using the attribute */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension using the attribute */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_usage_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_usage_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_usage_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_history_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_translation" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "outsystems_type" TEXT /* OutSystems data type */,
  "dotnet_type" TEXT /* Corresponding Microsoft .NET data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the translation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each naming rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the naming rule */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the naming rule */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rule (e.g., attribute names, module names, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute being documented */,
  "doc_content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_documentation_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute being analyzed */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of times the attribute has been used */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was last accessed */,
  "average_usage_time" INTEGER /* Average time spent using the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_analytics_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute with the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_issues_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization suggestion */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute that needs optimization */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestion for optimizing the attribute */,
  "suggested_date" TEXT /* Date when the suggestion was made */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the suggestion (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_optimization_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute being reported on */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_reports_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Admin, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_user_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., created, updated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_user_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_user_map_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)
